summary: Excellent audio transfer of the 03/23/86 Philadelphia Spectrum show, praised as a top‑quality audience source
review: Both reviewers rave about the sound quality, noting that the mastering and transfer bring the 1986 Philly Spectrum performance to life. The recording is described as “great” and the best available audience source, with no complaints noted about the music itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are highly positive (5 and 4 stars) and focus on superb audio quality; lack of musical commentary limits confidence, but the recording is clearly well‑received.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mastering/transfer praised as bringing the show to life; listeners describe the sound as great and the best audio source available.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on performance or set structure were provided.
